summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are allowed by this job. No merge_candidate is safe because the preflight artifact lacks Codex /review proof and mergeability is unknown for all PRs; several PRs also have waiting-on-author or broad-diff blockers.

actions.reason: Broad mixed-surface code delta needs maintainer judgment before merge or repair planning.
Small contributor PR appears repairable and should be finalized through guarded branch repair, Codex /review, and pnpm validation before merge.
Create an executable repair artifact for #81471 rather than recommending merge without complete merge preflight.
Maintainer judgment is needed before treating this replacement PR as canonical because the referenced predecessor is unhydrated and the PR is marked waiting on author.
Do not merge or close in this plan; keep as independent low-signal docs work blocked by proof failure and job permissions.
The live state changed materially and the PR is marked waiting on author with unhydrated discussion, so maintainer review is required before merge or repair.

needs_human: #78381 requires maintainer judgment for broad mixed-surface delta before repair or merge.
#83670 requires maintainer judgment because it claims to replace unhydrated #53762 and is marked waiting on author.
#71537 requires maintainer judgment because live state changed after inventory and the PR is marked waiting on author with unhydrated discussion.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #81471 in place, preserving edenfunf's authorship, then run narrow validation and Codex /review before any merge recommendation. The intended fix is limited to LINE multi-account resolution: load channels.line.accounts.default for the default account and default-enable named accounts unless explicitly disabled, with focused tests for both behaviors.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(line): load accounts.default and default-enable named accounts
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repairs and finalizes contributor PR #81471 by @edenfunf.

Scope:
- Keep LINE account resolution limited to extensions/line/src/accounts.ts.
- Preserve tests in extensions/line/src/accounts.test.ts covering accounts.default lookup and default-enabled named accounts.
- Preserve the #47264 linkage from the source PR.

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run extensions/line/src/accounts.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review must pass cleanly before merge.

Credit: source PR #81471 by @edenfunf.
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @edenfunf and PR #81471.
The PR body says this fixes #47264; keep that linkage in any final merge or replacement PR body.
